flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at St Lawrence University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.9k → $39.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at St Lawrence University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2k → 1.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at St Lawrence University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (77.4% → 68.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St Lawrence University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
